title: Interval-compressed chemotherapy in patients with Ewing's sarcoma: report on feasibility and toxicity from a North African center.
abstract: Ewing's sarcoma (ES) is the second most common malignant bone tumor in patients under 20 years of age. The "Euro-Ewing 2012" trial established induction therapy with the 2-week-interval VDC/IE (Vincristine-Doxorubicine-Cyclophosphamide/Ifosfamide-Etoposide) as the standard of care. However, real-world data remain limited. We aimed to determine the feasibility, tolerance, and effectiveness of this protocol.
